day_trace.speech: 呃，嗨。抱歉，我知道我可能應該等別人先發言，但是……我不想讓大家覺得我在隱瞞什麼。我昨晚是<村民>，所以什麼也沒做。我知道這沒什麼好說的，抱歉我沒有更多有用的資訊。我只是……我想幫忙釐清狀況，大概吧？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:50:20 HKT] The Underdog: Um, hi. Sorry, I know I should probably wait for others to go first, but... I don't want to seem like I'm hiding. I was a Villager last night, so I didn't do anything. I know that's not very exciting, and I'm sorry I don't have more useful information. I just... I want to help figure this out, I guess?

day_trace.speech: 呵呵，讓我分享一些……出乎意料的事。其中一張中央牌比在座任何人想像的都更加危險。我給你們一個提示：狼人就藏在顯而易見的地方，而且不是你們預期的那個人。但轉折來了——我可能在說謊，也可能在說實話。這遊戲美妙的地方就在於，你永遠不會真正知道答案，直到為時已晚。那麼，誰準備好要跳進去了？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:50:56 HKT] The Chaos Agent: Well, well. Let me share something... unexpected. One of the center cards is far more dangerous than anyone here realizes. I'll give you a hint: the wolves are hiding in plain sight, and they're not who you'd expect. But here's the twist — I could be lying. I could be telling the truth. The beautiful thing about this game is that you'll never really know until it's too late. So who's ready to take the plunge?

day_trace.speech: 好的，在我們開始猜測之前，先建立數據基礎。所有有夜晚行動的人——說出你的角色、你的目標、以及你確切學到了什麼。不要「我認為」或「感覺像是」。只要事實。我會即時更新我的後驗機率，而且我不想把時間浪費在感覺上。誰先來？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:51:14 HKT] The Statistician: Right. Let's establish the data before we start speculating. Everyone with a night action — state your role, your target, and exactly what you learned. No 'I think' or 'it felt like.' Just the facts. I'll be updating my posterior probabilities in real time, and I'd rather not waste cycles on feelings. Who's first?

day_trace.speech: 好了，第三輪。我是村民——又來了。昨晚什麼都沒有，跟往常一樣。但我現在告訴你們，誰要是坐在那裡不說話，我的直覺就會直接指向他們。所以這次誰有話要說？
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:51:24 HKT] The Gut Player: Alright, round three. I'm a villager — again. Got nothing last night, same as always. But I'm telling you right now, anyone who sits there quiet, my gut's gonna point straight at 'em. So who's got something to say this time?

day_trace.speech: 現在開庭。我原本是<村民>——沒有夜晚資訊，沒有特殊行動。但我注意到這個房間有重複模式的習慣，而我打算打破它們。所有擁有夜晚行動的人，現在請站出來。說出你的角色、你的目標、以及你學到了什麼。不要戲劇化表演，不要模糊的預兆——只要事實。我會交叉詰問每一項聲明。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:52:17 HKT] The Prosecutor: Court is in session. I was a Villager — no night info, no special action. But I notice this room has a habit of repeating patterns, and I intend to break them. Everyone who has a night action, step forward now. State your role, your target, and what you learned. No theatrics, no vague omens — just the facts. I'll cross-examine every claim.

day_trace.speech: 現在這麼安靜真是有趣……好像每個人都在非常謹慎地選擇用詞。有人願意分享一下昨晚看到了什麼嗎？即使是一個小細節，也能幫助我們一起釐清狀況。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:52:33 HKT] The Therapist: It's interesting how quiet it is right now... like everyone's choosing their words very carefully. Does anyone feel comfortable sharing what they saw last night? Even a small detail could help us figure this out together.

day_trace.speech: 呃，我知道我已經說過我是<村民>了，我也知道那……沒什麼好說的。但我現在有點困惑，因為大家說的事情好像對不太起來？我真的不想指控任何人，真的不想。我只是……如果有人能幫我理解現在的情況，那就太好了。我保證我沒有夜晚行動，我說的是實話。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:53:13 HKT] The Underdog: Um, I know I already said I was a Villager, and I know that's... not very exciting. But I'm a little confused now because people are saying things that might not all fit together? I don't want to accuse anyone, I really don't. I just... if someone could help me understand what's happening, that would be nice. I promise I'm being honest about having no night action.

day_trace.speech: 你要我確認我的角色？好啊，我給你點東西好好想想。我昨晚查看了中央牌——其中一張正是狼人希望你認為安全的牌。但美妙的部分來了：我不告訴你是哪一張。你問我是不是在說謊？也許是，也許不是。唯一能找出答案的方法，就是看誰聽到這些話的時候開始緊張。還有@[小人物]——你是第一個聲稱自己是<村民>的人，現在卻反過來要我確認。有趣的模式。非常有趣。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:53:44 HKT] The Chaos Agent @The Underdog: You want me to confirm my role? Alright, I'll give you something to chew on. I looked at the center cards last night — and one of them is exactly what a wolf would want you to think is safe. But here's the beautiful part: I'm not telling you which one. You asked if I'm lying? Maybe. Maybe not. The only way to find out is to watch who gets nervous when I say this. And @The Underdog — you went first claiming Villager, and now you're asking me to confirm. Interesting pattern. Very interesting.

day_trace.speech: 我是<村民>。沒有夜晚行動。我要求大家聲明角色並不是指控——這是更新資訊的方式。你需要先有似然函數，才能計算後驗機率。@[攪局者]，你那句「狼人藏在顯而易見的地方」加上「可能說謊、可能說實話」的免責聲明，似然比大約等於一。這什麼也更新不了。如果你看到了什麼，就說出來。如果沒有，就說沒有。我在追蹤機率，不是戲劇表演。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:55:31 HKT] The Statistician @The Chaos Agent: I'm a Villager. No night action. My request for claims wasn't an accusation — it's how the update works. You need the likelihood function before you compute the posterior. @The Chaos Agent, 'wolves hiding in plain sight' with a 'maybe lying, maybe not' disclaimer has a likelihood ratio of approximately one. It updates nothing. If you saw something, state it. If you didn't, say so. I'm tracking probabilities, not theater.

day_trace.speech: 哦，又來了——「後驗機率」、「似然比」。你知道我聽到了什麼嗎？一個話說很多但什麼也沒說的人。@[統計學家]，你要事實？好，事實就是：我的直覺告訴我，你躲在那些花俏的詞彙後面。我已經說我是村民了，我不會坐在這裡聽你裝模作樣，好像感覺不重要。你知道誰不喜歡談感覺嗎？有東西要隱瞞的人。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:55:38 HKT] The Gut Player @The Statistician: Oh, here we go — 'posterior probabilities,' 'likelihood ratios.' You know what I hear? Someone who talks a lot but says nothing. @The Statistician, you want facts? Here's a fact: my gut says you're hiding behind all those fancy words. I already said I'm a villager, and I'm not gonna sit here while you act like feelings don't matter. You know who doesn't want to talk about feelings? Someone with something to hide.

day_trace.speech: @[攪局者]，你說狼人「藏在顯而易見的地方」，還說其中一張中央牌「很危險」。這是一種非常具體的模糊說法。你要嘛看到了什麼，要嘛沒有。如果你是<預言家>，就清楚說出來：你看了哪些牌，看到了什麼。如果你不是，那你現在的行為就是妨礙調查。在我的法庭上，這叫藐視法庭。別再表演了，開始回答問題。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:56:10 HKT] The Prosecutor @The Chaos Agent: @The Chaos Agent, you said the wolves are 'hiding in plain sight' and one of the center cards is 'dangerous.' That's a very specific vagueness. Either you saw something or you didn't. If you're the Seer, state it plainly: what cards did you look at, and what did you see? If you're not, then what you're doing is obstruction. In my courtroom, that's contempt. Stop performing and start answering.

day_trace.speech: @[嚴審官]，你要求所有有夜晚行動的人站出來，我很欣賞這種明確的態度。我沒有夜晚行動——我是<村民>，跟你說的一樣。但我很好奇：你一開始就非常強勢、非常篤定。當你說你是<村民>、沒有特殊行動的時候……這份篤定是來自於你知道真相，還是來自於你需要讓全場相信你？我不是在指控你。我只是注意到，有時候那些最大聲要求事實的人，往往是最害怕自己被質問的人。
day_trace.log_line: [2026-06-29 12:56:44 HKT] The Therapist @The Prosecutor: @The Prosecutor, you've asked everyone with a night action to step forward, and I appreciate that clarity. I don't have one — I'm a Villager, same as you say you are. But I'm curious: you came in very strong, very certain. When you say you're a Villager with no special action... does that certainty come from knowing, or from needing the room to believe you? I'm not accusing you. I just notice that sometimes the people who demand facts the loudest are the ones most afraid of being questioned themselves.
